title: Block Traits
description: Change the connection, multiblock state, placement position and/or direction behaviors of a block

minecraft:connection.title: Connection
minecraft:connection.description: Adds connection states to the block. The values of these states are updated when the block or neighboring blocks change.

enabled_states.description: Which connection states to enable. Options: ["minecraft:cardinal_connections"]. Must specify at least one.

minecraft:multi_block.title: Multi Block
minecraft:multi_block.description: Adds the "minecraft:multi_block_part" state and multi block functionality to the block.

direction.title: Facing
direction.description: The direction the block parts are placed starting from 'minecraft:multi_block_part' permutation '0' to permutation 'parts'. Default value is 'up'.

enabled_states.description: Which state to enable. Must specify at least one. Options: ["minecraft:multi_block_part"].

parts.description: The number of block parts, this sets the value for state 'minecraft:multi_block_part'. Default value is '2'.

minecraft:placement_direction.title: Placement Direction
minecraft:placement_direction.description: Adds the "minecraft:cardinal_direction", "minecraft:facing_direction" and/or "minecraft:corner_and_cardinal_direction" states and setter function to the block.

blocks_to_corner_with.description: A list of block descriptors that define the blocks to connect with the corner shape.

enabled_states.description: Which states to enable. Must specify at least one. Options: ["minecraft:cardinal_direction", "minecraft:facing_direction", "minecraft:corner_and_cardinal_direction", "minecraft:sixteen_way_rotation"].

y_rotation_offset.description: The y rotation offset to apply to the block. Must be [0.0, 90.0, 180.0, 270.0, 360.0]. Default is 0, meaning if the player is facing north, the "minecraft:cardinal_direction" and/or "minecraft:facing_direction" state will be north.

minecraft:placement_position.title: Placement Position
minecraft:placement_position.description: Adds the "minecraft:block_face" and/or "minecraft:vertical_half" states and setter function to the block.

enabled_states.description: Which states to enable. Must specify at least one. Options: ["minecraft:block_face", "minecraft:vertical_half"].
